calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2012 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-10-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-10-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-20-12 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire,, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225.
Carolyn Morris, Esq. appeared on behalf of plaintiff George Ballard Co.
Virgina Lam, collections analyst for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
Michael Heath, Esq. appeared with defendant Mark David Sargent, president of Bright Ideas Design Center, Inc., and Mark David Sargent, individually and dba Bright Ideas Design Center, a/k/a Bright Ideas Design Centers, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Morgan Sargent

Settlement Agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Ms. MorrisPollak.

Pursuant to the agreement of the parties, plaintiff George Ballard Co. shall recover from defendants Bright Ideas Design Center, Inc., a corporation, Mark David Sargent and Morgan Sargent, each individually and dba Bright Ideas Design Center, a/k/a Bright Ideas Design Centers, as follows:

Damages - $18,729.57.
Interest - $5,311.85.
Attorney's Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $413.00.
Judgment is stayed pending defendants' payment of $15,330.00 in forty-two installment payments. Commencing April, 2008, defendants shall pay plaintiff $365.00 per month, by the 20th day of each month. Defendants shall receive a five day grace period each month to submit said payments to plaintiffs. Defendants shall receive one 10 day notice per annum to correct any irregularity their payments to plaintiff. If defendants fail to comply with the terms of this agreement, plaintiff may obtain, through ex parte application, a judgment in the amount of $25,454.42.

The Court approves the settlement agreement reached by the parties.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2007 Set For Trial On Mar-10-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-06-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING:

DEFENDANTS BRIGHT IDEAS DESIGN CENTER, INC., MARK SARGENT, AND MORGAN SARGENT'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment IS OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT. PARTIES STIPULATED AND COURT ORDERED VACATION OF DEFAULT ON NOVEMBER 26, 2007. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600 (302/PJM)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2007 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
